name: No Sugar Apple Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the apple juice concentrate, cornstarch, water, and apple pie spice in a bowl until well combined.
2. Cook the mixture over low heat until it thickens.
3. Slice the apples into thin slices.
4. Place the sliced apples into an uncooked pie crust.
5. Pour the thickened mixture over the apples.
6. Cover with the top pie crust.
7. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 45 minutes, or until the apples are tender.
8. Optionally, sprinkle Sweet and Low on top of the apples before baking.
Note: This pie can be made without a crust to save calories. Simply pour the mixture over the apples in a pie pan.
